message:
feat(fr-store): FUNCTION DUMP body uses RDB length + RDB-string encoding (br-frankenredis-r85v)

Step toward upstream-compat body format: replace the previous
fixed-width u32-LE length prefixes with the same RDB encoding
primitives that Store::dump_key uses (encode_length /
encode_rdb_string for write; decode_length / decode_rdb_string
for read).

Body: [rdb-length count] [for each: rdb-string name; rdb-string
code; rdb-string engine] (the per-library subfield ordering still
diverges from upstream's name → engine → description → code; the
v8s5-style cross-impl round-trip gate against vendored
redis-server is the next slice of r85v).

Also drop the EMPTY_FUNCTION_DUMP_PAYLOAD short-circuit + constant
since the new encoder builds the empty case correctly via
encode_length(0) + footer.

fr-store 289 passed; fr-runtime 281 passed; fr-command 656 passed;
cargo clippy --tests -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Slice of br-frankenredis-r85v.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
